Precondition: Both end_effectors grasp nothing; box_2 is right of box_1.
Postcondition: box_2 has been pushed from the front by the right arm.

Precondition: Both end_effectors grasp nothing; box_1 right & left sides are available for dual-arm symmetric contact.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact on right & left sides.
